# Copilot Context

## Tech stack
- Node.js
- Express.js
- Handlebars (hbs)
- HTML/CSS

## Project structure
- `app.js` - Express app configuration
- `bin/www` - HTTP server launcher
- `routes/index.js` - route definitions for all pages
- `views/layout.hbs` - shared layout with header/footer
- `views/index.hbs` - home page
- `views/about.hbs` - about page
- `views/projects.hbs` - projects page
- `views/contact.hbs` - contact page
- `views/error.hbs` - 404 and error page
- `public/stylesheets/style.css` - styling

## Live site note
This project is currently a local demo repository. It is ready to deploy once pushed to GitHub and a hosting provider.
